# Test Case Design - ChassisControl

High-level test cases for the **ChassisControl** architecture model. Chassis Control (introduced R2.0): ABS, traction, steering assist and suspension.

---
## Test Case: TC.001 - abs init & cyclic

**Given** the ECU has powered on
**When** `Chs_Abs_Init` then `Chs_Abs_Step` are called
**Then** the phase becomes RUN and `value` is a filtered, clamped sample (REQ-CHS-ABS7)
